FFlagAxesNewParamTypeVariadic.mechanism: Allows a new type of parameter for axes in scripting.
FFlagAxesNewParamTypeVariadic.purpose: Gives developers more flexibility in creating complex game mechanics.

FFlagEnableConsoleExpControls684_Staged.mechanism: Enables experimental controls in the console for developers.
FFlagEnableConsoleExpControls684_Staged.purpose: Provides developers with advanced tools for testing and debugging their games.
